title: Taxonomy Architecture Analyzer
description: Taxonomy Architecture Analyzer is a research-oriented architecture analysis tool. It maps plain-language requirements to a layered architecture taxonomy, produces hierarchical scoring traces, builds architecture impact views, supports graph and relation exploration, and exports results to formats such as ArchiMate, Visio, Mermaid, JSON, Markdown, HTML, and DOCX.
notes: The Zenodo archive captures a release of the source code, metadata, citation instructions, and research documentation. Reproducibility instructions are provided in docs/research/reproducibility.md.
